summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Sales and Sales Return UX Refactor into Unified Record Workspace Pattern. All 14 features tested and verified working correctly.

frontend: Sales List page - entire row is clickable (cursor-pointer class, hover:bg-blue-50)
Sales List page - clicking row navigates to /billing/{id}
Sales Record Workspace displays bill details with Header (bill number INV-YYYYMMDD-XXXX, status badge, date)
Sales Record Workspace has Return button in top right (only for SALE type, not draft) - data-testid='return-btn'
Sales Record Workspace has History button in top right - data-testid='history-btn'
Sales Record Workspace has Print button in top right - data-testid='print-btn'
Sales Record Workspace has Edit button only for draft status - data-testid='edit-btn'
Clicking Return button enters Return Mode with orange banner (bg-orange-500)
Return Mode shows checkboxes for each item - data-testid='select-item-{index}'
Return Mode allows selecting items and adjusting return quantity - data-testid='return-qty-{index}'
Return Mode shows Return Summary with calculated total and selected items count
Submit Return creates new SALES_RETURN record (RTN-YYYYMMDD-XXXX) linked to original sale
Sales Return List page - entire row is clickable (cursor-pointer class, hover:bg-orange-50)
Sales Return Record Workspace shows linked original bill reference with 'View Original Bill' button

critical_code_review_comments: BillingList.js correctly implements clickable rows with data-testid attributes for both Sales and Returns tables
BillDetail.js properly implements Return Mode with orange banner, checkboxes, editable quantities, and Return Summary
Button visibility logic correctly implemented: Return button only for non-draft SALE type, Edit button only for draft status
Return submission correctly creates SALES_RETURN record with ref_invoice_id linking to original sale
Activity History dialog properly integrated with ActivityTimeline component
Code uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from environment variables correctly
seed_data_creation: Created test return RTN-20260211-0012 from bill INV-20260211-0023 during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales and Sales Return UX refactor fully tested. Key features: 1) BillingList.js has Sales/Returns tabs with clickable rows (data-testid='sales-row-{id}' and 'return-row-{id}'), 2) BillDetail.js serves as unified Record Workspace with View Mode (Return/History/Print/Edit buttons) and Return Mode (orange banner, checkboxes, quantity inputs, submit return), 3) Return button only shown for non-draft SALE type, Edit button only for draft, 4) Returns show 'Original Sale' section with link to original bill. Test bill: INV-20260211-0023 (id: 4eb3e3e2-f21c-4cda-974e-76acd2315f6c). Test credentials: testadmin@pharmacy.com/admin123
